title: Pastel Transfer Studies
description: Four independent single-image studies applying the same centered, pastel, film-poster grammar to unrelated research subjects.
creative_direction: Each image is an independent transfer problem: preserve the visual language of symmetry, frontal staging, miniature production design, muted candy color, and deadpan character placement while changing the subject domain completely.

en.title: Pastel Transfer Studies
en.description: Four independent single-image studies applying the same centered, pastel, film-poster grammar to unrelated research subjects.

zh-CN.title: 糖色迁移单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图,把中轴、糖色、电影海报式布景和正面人物迁移到互不相关的研究主题。
